**Phenol Fukui reactivity indices** — Chemical reactivity property; DFT **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (tier standard), exact two-electron integrals (no density fitting), gas phase (no solvent), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`, single-point Fukui calculation (no geometry relaxation). Computed with chemkit’s `fukui-reactivity` (PySCF backend). SCF converged for the neutral, cation (doublet), and anion (doublet) states. CLI invocation:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz \
  --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard \
  --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout none \
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpeg1p4ht6/live.json
```
